'''raroyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadsorbent|coadsorbent]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadsorbent|coadsorbent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| raroyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræreyeth|ræreyeth]] || [[word:ræreyej|ræreyej]] || [[word:ræreyesh|ræreyesh]] || [[word:ræreye|ræreye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:raroroyoth|raroroyoth]] || [[word:raroroyoj|raroroyoj]] || [[word:raroroyosh|raroroyosh]] || [[word:raroroyo|raroroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:raroyoth|raroyoth]] || [[word:raroyoj|raroyoj]] || [[word:raroyosh|raroyosh]] || [[word:raroyo|raroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarofyoth|rarofyoth]] || [[word:rarofyoj|rarofyoj]] || [[word:rarofyosh|rarofyosh]] || [[word:rarofyof|rarofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:raroyotho|raroyotho]] || [[word:raroyojo|raroyojo]] || [[word:raroyosho|raroyosho]] || [[word:raroyoko|raroyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:raroyoth|raroyoth]] || [[word:raroyoj|raroyoj]] || [[word:raroyosh|raroyosh]] || [[word:raroyo|raroyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:raroyothol|raroyothol]] || [[word:raroyojol|raroyojol]] || [[word:raroyoshol|raroyoshol]] || [[word:raroyokol|raroyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:raroyothotho|raroyothotho]] || [[word:raroyojojo|raroyojojo]] || [[word:raroyoshosho|raroyoshosho]] || [[word:raroyoko|raroyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:raroyothon|raroyothon]] || [[word:raroyojon|raroyojon]] || [[word:raroyoshon|raroyoshon]] || [[word:raroyokon|raroyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:raroyothoro|raroyothoro]] || [[word:raroyojoro|raroyojoro]] || [[word:raroyoshoro|raroyoshoro]] || [[word:raroyokoro|raroyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
